mypaintr 0.0.1
  • Reference
    • Hand Demo
    • Introduction to mypaintr

Compute or draw rough polygons

Source: R/draw-rough.R
rough_polygons.Rd

Compute or draw rough polygons

Usage

rough_polygons(x, y = NULL, hand = NULL)

rough_polygon(x, y = NULL, hand = NULL)

draw_rough_polygons(
  x,
  y = NULL,
  hand = NULL,
  col = NA,
  border = graphics::par("fg"),
  fill_pattern = NULL,
  ...
)

Arguments

x, y

Polygon coordinates.

hand

Hand-drawn geometry settings created with hand().

col

Fill colour. When visible and fill_pattern is NULL, a solid fill is drawn.

border

Border colour.

fill_pattern

Optional fill pattern created with hatch(), crosshatch(), zigzag(), or jumble().

...

Graphics parameters passed to graphics::lines().

Value

A list with x and y components containing a roughened closed outline suitable for plotting with graphics::lines().

See also

Other rough drawing helpers: rough_arrows(), rough_lines(), rough_points(), rough_polypath(), rough_rect(), rough_segments()

Examples

rough_polygons(c(2, 5, 8, 3), c(2, 7, 5, 1))
#> $x
#>   [1] 2.000000 2.045822 2.091537 2.137140 2.182627 2.227995 2.273240 2.318361
#>   [9] 2.363355 2.408221 2.452957 2.497564 2.542040 2.586386 2.630603 2.674691
#>  [17] 2.718654 2.762491 2.806207 2.849804 2.893285 2.936653 2.979913 3.023586
#>  [25] 3.068957 3.114337 3.159715 3.205083 3.250431 3.295749 3.341029 3.386259
#>  [33] 3.431430 3.476533 3.521559 3.566499 3.611342 3.656081 3.700706 3.745210
#>  [41] 3.789584 3.833821 3.877912 3.921852 3.965633 4.009249 4.051984 4.093772
#>  [49] 4.135471 4.177086 4.218623 4.260086 4.301481 4.342812 4.384085 4.425306
#>  [57] 4.466480 4.507612 4.548709 4.589776 4.630817 4.671840 4.712850 4.753851
#>  [65] 4.794850 4.835853 4.876863 4.917888 4.958932 5.000000 5.069291 5.138520
#>  [73] 5.207693 5.276812 5.345882 5.414908 5.483897 5.552854 5.621787 5.690702
#>  [81] 5.759606 5.828509 5.897417 5.966339 6.035720 6.105268 6.174885 6.244569
#>  [89] 6.314320 6.384135 6.454012 6.523950 6.593945 6.663995 6.734096 6.804244
#>  [97] 6.874436 6.944668 7.014981 7.085348 7.155734 7.226134 7.296542 7.366953
#> [105] 7.437362 7.507764 7.578153 7.648526 7.718878 7.789204 7.859503 7.929769
#> [113] 8.000000 7.937175 7.874300 7.811369 7.748377 7.685321 7.622196 7.558997
#> [121] 7.495721 7.432365 7.368924 7.305395 7.241776 7.178063 7.114253 7.050346
#> [129] 6.986337 6.922226 6.858010 6.793689 6.729261 6.664725 6.600080 6.535326
#> [137] 6.470462 6.405490 6.341421 6.277378 6.213268 6.149087 6.084830 6.020491
#> [145] 5.956066 5.891551 5.826941 5.762231 5.697418 5.632497 5.567464 5.502316
#> [153] 5.437049 5.371661 5.306147 5.240505 5.174733 5.108828 5.042788 4.976611
#> [161] 4.910295 4.843840 4.777244 4.709899 4.642330 4.574659 4.506890 4.439027
#> [169] 4.371073 4.303032 4.234910 4.166709 4.098435 4.030091 3.961684 3.893217
#> [177] 3.824695 3.756123 3.687507 3.618850 3.550159 3.481439 3.412694 3.343929
#> [185] 3.275151 3.206363 3.137572 3.068783 3.000000 2.941152 2.881381 2.820626
#> [193] 2.758895 2.696258 2.635423 2.575367 2.514956 2.453970 2.392211 2.328920
#> [201] 2.264108 2.198698 2.132791 2.066512 2.000000
#> 
#> $y
#>   [1] 2.000000 2.071057 2.142179 2.213368 2.284627 2.355957 2.427360 2.498838
#>   [9] 2.570393 2.642024 2.713733 2.785520 2.857385 2.929328 3.001349 3.073446
#>  [17] 3.145619 3.217868 3.290189 3.362582 3.435044 3.507573 3.580168 3.652515
#>  [25] 3.723843 3.795166 3.866490 3.937820 4.009162 4.080521 4.151905 4.223317
#>  [33] 4.294765 4.366254 4.437789 4.509376 4.581021 4.652728 4.724504 4.796352
#>  [41] 4.868278 4.940287 5.012383 5.084570 5.156852 5.229233 5.302143 5.375621
#>  [49] 5.449152 5.522734 5.596362 5.670035 5.743749 5.817501 5.891288 5.965106
#>  [57] 6.038953 6.112824 6.186717 6.260627 6.334553 6.408490 6.482435 6.556385
#>  [65] 6.630336 6.704286 6.778230 6.852166 6.926090 7.000000 6.952773 6.905455
#>  [73] 6.858051 6.810566 6.763009 6.715386 6.667706 6.619979 6.572215 6.524425
#>  [81] 6.476619 6.428810 6.381009 6.333230 6.286138 6.239298 6.192560 6.145923
#>  [89] 6.099386 6.052946 6.006600 5.960344 5.914174 5.868086 5.822074 5.776133
#>  [97] 5.730259 5.684444 5.638751 5.593139 5.547555 5.501992 5.456441 5.410895
#> [105] 5.365346 5.319785 5.274206 5.228603 5.182967 5.137295 5.091579 5.045816
#> [113] 5.000000 4.943663 4.887389 4.831184 4.775055 4.719007 4.663045 4.607175
#> [121] 4.551401 4.495728 4.440161 4.384704 4.329359 4.274132 4.219025 4.164042
#> [129] 4.109184 4.054455 3.999856 3.945389 3.891056 3.836857 3.782795 3.728869
#> [137] 3.675080 3.621427 3.566644 3.511830 3.457099 3.402457 3.347910 3.293465
#> [145] 3.239128 3.184903 3.130798 3.076816 3.022965 2.969248 2.915670 2.862237
#> [153] 2.808951 2.755819 2.702843 2.650027 2.597373 2.544886 2.492568 2.440421
#> [161] 2.388447 2.336647 2.285024 2.234337 2.183929 2.133649 2.083492 2.033453
#> [169] 1.983527 1.933710 1.883995 1.834377 1.784852 1.735412 1.686053 1.636769
#> [177] 1.587552 1.538399 1.489301 1.440253 1.391248 1.342281 1.293344 1.244431
#> [185] 1.195535 1.146651 1.097771 1.048890 1.000000 1.066152 1.131381 1.195626
#> [193] 1.258895 1.321258 1.385423 1.450367 1.514956 1.578970 1.642211 1.703920
#> [201] 1.764108 1.823698 1.882791 1.941512 2.000000
#> 
plot(1:10, 1:10, type = "n")
draw_rough_polygons(c(2, 5, 8, 3), c(2, 7, 5, 1),
                    col = "grey90",
                    fill_pattern = zigzag())
